description: Create a tensor data entry. Tensors are an internal list of user-defined objects that have the position v and a tensor value (assigned via the value or principal keywords) associated with them. Tensors may also have groups and extra variables assigned to them upon creation.

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: Optionally assign the extra variable a to index i .

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: Optionally assign the group name s to slot s2 . By default, s2 = Default .

keywords.name: principal
keywords.description: Assign the tensor from the principal axes. Vector vprin is the principal stress magnitudes in maximum, intermediate, and minimum order. [CS: this doc needs to be added for pfc ](See ref-stresssignconventions-.) Vector vmax is the direction of the maximum principal stress, and vector vint is the direction of the intermediate principal stress.

keywords.name: value
keywords.description: Assign the values of the tensor directly in the order s11, s22, s33, s12, s13, s23.

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: Optionally assign the extra variable a to index i .

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: Optionally assign the group name s to slot s2 . By default, s2 = Default .
